title: EarthLand: Season 13
description: The official modpack for EarthLand Season 13. It features Create, Origins, Ad Astra, Terralith, and much much more.
body:
This modpack is a collection of mods designed for a private SMP, but still makes for a fun singleplayer adventure.

---
- Build elaborate contraptions with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and its numerous addons! ⚙️🚂
- Trace the stars to [form constellations](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyglass-astronomy), or shoot for them yourself with [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)! 🚀👽
- Become a culinary king with a plethora of food and drink mods, such as the [Let's Do](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-api) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) series! 🥘🍴
- Rule a village and start a life of your own with [MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn)! 💒🎉
- Explore a vast and dangerous world with beautiful biomes from [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether), and [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)! 🌋🏝️
- See the world from a different perspective with over 15 custom [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)! 🧚🐉
- Conquer the arts of photography and painting with [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) and [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting)! 📷🎨
- Become a powerful sorcerer with the [RPG Series](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)! 🧙🌟
- ...and much, _much_ more!

---
As stated before, this modpack is designed to be played with many players. While it is fully enjoyable in singleplayer, there's lots of great qualities better with friends!
- Dance the night away with [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft)! 🕺👋
- Blast your favorite tunes, or compose your own with [Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-melodies) and the [Music Maker Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-maker-mod)! 🎹🎶
- Immerse yourself with [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), and it's Walkie-Talkie/Radio addon!🎤📻
- Explore together, with [Kaffee's Dual Ride](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaffees_dual_ride) and [Mythic Mounts](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-mounts)! 🐎🦋
- ...and much, _much_ more!

---
Also contains the [Simple Create Radios](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-create-radios) resource pack for parity.
